actions.value:
To restore any previously Archived wallets from within your Edge account:

​

Open the Main Menu (≡) in the top-right

- Click on 'Settings' and scroll toward the bottom

- Tap on 'Restore Wallets'

- Select any wallets you want to bring back into your account, and tap 'Restore'

 

Please let us know if you have any more questions.

To restore any previously Archived or Deleted wallets from within your Edge account:
​
Open the Main Menu (≡) in the top-right
- Click on 'Settings' and scroll toward the bottom
- Tap on 'Restore Wallets'
- Select any wallets you want to bring back into your account, and tap 'Restore'

Please let us know if you have any more questions.
